data.text:
All six ACs are satisfied:

1. `TestHandleAgentModelsNoProviders`, `TestMCPAgentModels`, `TestMCPAgentModelsSingleProvider` — `testing.Short()` + `t.Skip(...)` added at top of each.
2. `TestMCPAgentDispatchTrustedAllowed` — same pattern added.
3. `-short` run reports SKIP for all four.
4. Non-short run (exercised implicitly by pre-commit `go-test` which runs without `-short`) reports PASS.
5. `go test -short ./internal/server/...` — green.
6. `lefthook run pre-commit` — all checks pass.
